response.justification: The candidate lacks the required 8 years of C++ experience and 5 years of large-scale cloud infrastructure or distributed systems work, with most roles centered on TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang — not C++ or cloud compute platforms. Their leadership experience is informal and unstructured, with no clear evidence of mentoring cloud/DevOps engineers or owning ambiguous cloud architecture projects.
strengths: Strong full-stack versatility across languages and domains
Demonstrated open-source contributions and technical mentoring through workshops
Experience with distributed systems via GISCollective and microservices
concerns: Only minimal C++ exposure (NI LabWindows), far below 8-year requirement
No evidence of cloud compute platform ownership or AWS/GCP/Azure architecture leadership
Lacks formal technical leadership experience mentoring cloud or infrastructure teams
